overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing the protagonist traversing a desolate black rocky beach in rainy, overcast weather. The character walks from an enclosed rocky valley toward the shoreline, eventually wading into shallow water with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky valley with black volcanic rocks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rocky valley carrying a large backpack

entered.detail: dark volcanic rock ground covering the valley floor
steep rock formation forming the left boundary of the valley
steep rock formation forming the right boundary of the valley
grey cloudy sky with visible rain particles

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed valley of black volcanic rock. The terrain is rugged and desolate, with steep rock walls on both sides and a misty overcast sky above. Rain particles fall gently as the character progresses forward.

events.description: valley opens up to reveal the shoreline and calm water on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the terrain opens to reveal the sea on the right

entered.detail: dark calm sea water visible beyond the rocky shore
large rock outcroppings visible in the distance across the water
isolated rock pillars standing in the water

segments.scene_description: The enclosed valley opens into a wide coastal landscape. The character walks along the black rocky shore with calm dark water now visible to the right. Sea stacks and distant rock formations emerge in the misty background as the right valley wall falls away.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach with lighthouse visible on the horizon

events.description: white lighthouse becomes visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky coast parallel to the water's edge

entered.detail: tall white lighthouse structure visible on the distant coastline
boulders scattered in the shallow coastal water

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open coastline, a white lighthouse appears in the distance on the left. The character continues past large boulders scattered in the shallow water, with the rocky shore now extending as a beach rather than a valley wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal water with panoramic mountain views

events.description: character steps from rocky shore into shallow water
camera pans to reveal massive snow-capped mountains in the background

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water while surveying the expansive landscape

entered.detail: massive mountain peaks with snow visible on their summits
faint rainbow-like arc visible in the cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: The character wades into the shallow dark water, leaving the shore behind. As the camera pans, a massive snow-capped mountain range is revealed in the background. A faint chiral rainbow arc appears in the sky as the character continues exploring the desolate coastal waters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic volcanic valley that gradually opens into a vast, desolate coastal expanse. It begins with the character navigating a narrow passage of rugged black rock under a misty, rain-streaked sky. As the character progresses, the steep valley walls fall away to reveal a wide shoreline where calm dark waters and distant sea stacks emerge from the haze. The scene then expands along the open beach, passing scattered boulders and a distant white lighthouse before the character wades directly into the shallow coastal waters. Finally, the camera pans to reveal a massive snow-capped mountain range under a sky marked by a faint chiral rainbow arc.
